claims.summary: Reciprocal uptake needs a ResonantPersistence outcome distinct from delivery or generic acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: Verified the current ReciprocalUptakeKindV1 includes ResonantPersistence as a distinct actor-authored outcome.

claims.summary: A resonance signature needs exact witness and parameter provenance.
claims.disposition: Verified current V3 receipts carry exact lived-state witness and bounded parameter references.

claims.summary: The signature must not silently imply semantic equivalence, spectral causation, or runtime influence.
claims.disposition: Verified explicit non-equivalence and non-causation scope and evidence-only authority.
